zh.Tadcaster, Yorkshire, England: 英國越可爾塔德卡斯特
zh.lifeSummary: 當Uchtred of Bamburgh於0971年出生在英國諾圖恩布利亞時，他的父親Waltheof of Bamburgh10968歲，母親Ælfleda32歲。他於1015年與Aelfgifu of Wessex在法國豪-諾門迪瑟-馬利格拉維爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1016年在英國越可爾懷吉爾享年45歲，埋葬在英國越可爾塔德卡斯特。

zh-hans.Tadcaster, Yorkshire, England: 英国越可爾塔德卡斯特
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Uchtred of Bamburgh于0971年出生在英国諾圖恩布利亞时，他的父亲Waltheof of Bamburgh10968岁，母亲Ælfleda32岁。他于1015年与Aelfgifu of Wessex在法国豪-諾門迪瑟-馬利格拉維爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1016年在英国越可爾懷吉爾享年45岁，埋葬在英国越可爾塔德卡斯特。

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Korean Kyong, Kyong Suk, Young, Chae, Chi Young, Hang, Kil, Rin, Sang Hun, Chang, Chong, Insoo, Kum, Sun Young, Yom, Young Hwan.  Cambodian Kiwan, Oeurn, Phoeun, Pich, Saroeuth, Seung, Sophath, Sophea, Yoeun, Phan, Son.  Indian Shanti, Harendra.
Indian (Uttar Pradesh): Brahmin name, from Sanskrit om, the Hindu sacred and mystic syllable uttered at the beginning of prayers.
Cambodian: written ឱម, corresponding to the exclamation of solemn affirmation, of Sanskrit origin (see 1 above), chanted by Buddhist monks.

variants.name: Oum
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Southeast Asian Heang, Hye, Kam, Kan, Kheng, Khin, Kun, Sang, Sok, Phong, Yom, Yoo, Youn, Cuong, Phal, Samnang, Tin.  Cambodian Sokha, Chheang, Choeun, Moeun, Roeun, Sambath, Samoeun, Savuth, Soeun, Sopheap.
Cambodian: written អ៊ុំ, from a Khmer word denoting an elder sibling of one's parent (i.e. ‘uncle’ or ‘aunt’). Compare   Om   3 and   Um   2.

nameMeanings.name: Bamburgh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Bamberg
meanings: German and Jewish (western Ashkenazic): habitational name from the city of Bamberg in Bavaria (formerly in Upper Franconia).
History: Between 1007 and 1702 the city of Bamberg was the capital of a powerful ecclesiastical state, and in the 15th century the bishops of Bamberg were raised to princely rank.

nameMeanings.name: Uchtred
meanings: An old name. The same as the personal name Utred or Uhtred, probably from Old German ot-rat, distinguished in counsel, or illustrious councillor.

historicEvents.title: Vikings Invade England
historicEvents.description: Viking raiders from Scandinavia invaded England in 980. Years later in 991, the English government paid them 10,000 in hopes for peace. The Viking raiders, however, continued to force more money from England.

historicEvents.title: Danes Attack London
historicEvents.description: Danes and Norwegians attacked London unsuccessfully in 994.

historicEvents.title: St. Brice's Day Massacre
historicEvents.description: King Aethelred ordered all Danish men in England to be killed. It is unknown how many Danes were killed due to this order.

historicEvents.title: Sweyn Forkbeard
historicEvents.description: The Danes raided and captured England. Sweyn, King of Danes, was declared King of England on Christmas Day.

historicEvents.title: Canut the Great
historicEvents.description: As Aethelred, King of England died, his son, Edmund Ironside devised a truce with Danish King Canute. The truce divided the kingdom between the two but Edmund died shortly after and became King of England. Several years later, he also became king of Denmark.

en.lifeSummary: When Uchtred of Bamburgh was born in 0971, in Northumbria, England, his father, Waltheof of Bamburgh, was 10968 and his mother, Ælfleda, was 32. He married Aelfgifu of Wessex in 1015, in Graville, Seine-Maritime, Upper Normandy, France. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1016, in Wighill, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 45, and was buried in Tadcaster, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Uchtred of Bamburgh est né en 0971, à Northumbria, Angleterre, son père, Waltheof of Bamburgh, avait 10968 ans et sa mère, Ælfleda, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Aelfgifu of Wessex en 1015, à Graville, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, France. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1016, à Wighill, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 45 ans, et a été enterré à Tadcaster, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Uchtred of Bamburgh 0971 in Northumbria, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Waltheof of Bamburgh 10968 und seine Mutter Ælfleda 32. Er hat 1015 in Graville, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Frankreich Aelfgifu of Wessex geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1016 im Alter von 45 Jahren in Wighill, Yorkshire, England und wurde in Tadcaster, Yorkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Uchtred of Bamburgh è nato il nel 0971 nel Northumbria, England, il suo padre, Waltheof of Bamburgh, aveva 10968 anni e il suo madre, Ælfleda, aveva 32 anni. Lui sposato Aelfgifu of Wessex nel 1015, nel Graville, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1016, nel Wighill, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 45 anni, e fu sepolto a Tadcaster, Yorkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Uchtred of Bamburghが0971年にイギリスノースウンブリアで生まれた時，父Waltheof of Bamburghは10968歳，母Ælfledaは32歳であった。1015年にフランスハウテ-ノーマンディセアイネ-マリティメグラヴィルでAelfgifu of Wessexと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1016年にイギリスヨークシュアイアウィギルで45歳で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアタドカスターにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Uchtred of Bamburgh(이)가 0971년 영국 노르스브리아에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Waltheof of Bamburgh(은)는 10968세였고, 그의 어머니 Ælfleda(은)는 32세였다. 그는 1015년 프랑스 하테-노먼디 세이인-마이팀 그래빌에서 Aelfgifu of Wessex(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1016년 영국 요르크실르 와이이에서 45세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 타드카스터에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Uchtred of Bamburgh nasceu em 0971, em Northumbria, Inglaterra, seu pai, Waltheof of Bamburgh, tinha 10968 anos e sua mãe, Ælfleda, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Aelfgifu of Wessex em 1015, em Graville, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 1016, em Wighill, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 45 anos, e foi sepultado em Tadcaster, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Uchtred of Bamburgh родился в 0971 г. в местности нортумбря, Англия, его отцу по имени Waltheof of Bamburgh было 10968 лет, а матери, которую звали Ælfleda, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Aelfgifu of Wessex в 1015 г. в местности гравилл, сине-маритим, хауте-норманди, Франция. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1016 г. в местности ваиилл, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 45 лет и был похоронен в местности тадкастир, еркшир, Англия.

sm.1006-1016: mai le 1006 e o'o I le 1016
sm.from 1016 to 1070: mai le 1016 e o'o I le 1070

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Uchtred of Bamburgh nació en 0971, en Northumbria, Inglaterra, su papá, Waltheof of Bamburgh, tenía 10968 años y su mamá, Ælfleda, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Aelfgifu of Wessex en 1015, en Graville, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1016, en Wighill, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 45 años, y fue sepultado en Tadcaster, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
